channel.title: Adiutor Update
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.2.0

✨ Changes & Improvements

  • Added deeper website integration: Adiutor now connects directly with the website experience for a smoother workflow.
  • Improved analytics flow: The My Sessions tab in the menu bar provides quick access to the integrated analytics experience, with study statistics loaded automatically and ready to view.

‼️ Bug Fixes

  • Includes minor bug fixes, stability improvements, and resolutions for reported crash instances.

Feedback

Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome through GitHub Issues.

Thank you for trying Adiutor.
